item.title: BETRAYED By Her Childhood Friend - Keeley Bunker
item.description: Wesley Streete, 20, raped Keeley Bunker and dumped her body in a brook in Wigginton Park, Tamworth, in September 2019, hiding her under branches. Keeley had earlier been to a concert to celebrate turning 20 and ""trusted"" the killer to walk her home. I cannot imagine what she must have felt in her last moments as the person who did all these horrible things to her was one of the people she trusted the most…

media:content.media:title: BETRAYED By Her Childhood Friend - Keeley Bunker
media:content.media:description: Wesley Streete, 20, raped Keeley Bunker and dumped her body in a brook in Wigginton Park, Tamworth, in September 2019, hiding her under branches. Keeley had earlier been to a concert to celebrate turning 20 and ""trusted"" the killer to walk her home. I cannot imagine what she must have felt in her last moments as the person who did all these horrible things to her was one of the people she trusted the most…

item.title: The Unsolved and Still Open Case Of Kate Bushell
item.description: The murder of 14-year-old Kate Bushell remains one of the United Kingdom’s most haunting unsolved cases. On November 15, 1997, Kate was walking a neighbor’s dog near Exwick Lane in Exeter, Devon, when she was attacked in broad daylight and fatally wounded with a single, devastating knife wound to her throat. Her body was later discovered by her father, sparking an investigation that continues nearly three decades later. Detectives believe the killer either lived in or knew the area well, using local escape routes to avoid capture. Despite extensive inquiries, no one has ever been convicted. Police remain convinced that someone holds the key piece of information needed to solve the case. Today, Kate’s murder stands as one of Devon and Cornwall Police’s longest-running cold cases, with a £20,000 reward still offered for information leading to her killer’s conviction.

media:content.media:title: The Unsolved and Still Open Case Of Kate Bushell
media:content.media:description: The murder of 14-year-old Kate Bushell remains one of the United Kingdom’s most haunting unsolved cases. On November 15, 1997, Kate was walking a neighbor’s dog near Exwick Lane in Exeter, Devon, when she was attacked in broad daylight and fatally wounded with a single, devastating knife wound to her throat. Her body was later discovered by her father, sparking an investigation that continues nearly three decades later. Detectives believe the killer either lived in or knew the area well, using local escape routes to avoid capture. Despite extensive inquiries, no one has ever been convicted. Police remain convinced that someone holds the key piece of information needed to solve the case. Today, Kate’s murder stands as one of Devon and Cornwall Police’s longest-running cold cases, with a £20,000 reward still offered for information leading to her killer’s conviction.

item.title: He Had to Audacity to Go On TV After What He Did!
item.description: MITCHELL QUY - A CASE OF DUPERS DELIGHT When Lynsey Wilson met Mitchell Quy she wasn’t aware of how controlling and abusive he was going to be until he showed her his true colours which ended up with her chilling disappearance and death. Have you heard of this case before? The audacity of him being able to go on TV?! I can't!

media:content.media:title: He Had to Audacity to Go On TV After What He Did!
media:content.media:description: MITCHELL QUY - A CASE OF DUPERS DELIGHT When Lynsey Wilson met Mitchell Quy she wasn’t aware of how controlling and abusive he was going to be until he showed her his true colours which ended up with her chilling disappearance and death. Have you heard of this case before? The audacity of him being able to go on TV?! I can't!

item.title: Babysitter From Hell: "She Fell from a Slide!"
item.description: Such a gorgeous, wonderful little darling of a child. My heart breaks for the family... What are your thoughts? Have you seen Kirsten's full interrogation footage?

media:content.media:title: Babysitter From Hell: "She Fell from a Slide!"
media:content.media:description: Such a gorgeous, wonderful little darling of a child. My heart breaks for the family... What are your thoughts? Have you seen Kirsten's full interrogation footage?
